title: quercus championii
intro: Quercus championii, also known as the Chinese cork tree or Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of tree in the beech family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark and leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus championii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of Quercus championii typically involve making a decoction of the bark and leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
